1.text: What describes your natural skin tone best?

2.text: What is your natural hair color (or childhood color)?

3.text: What is your natural eye color?

4.text: Which jewelry metal naturally enhances your complexion?

5.text: How much contrast is there between your hair, eyes, and skin?

6.text: How does your skin typically react to sun exposure?

7.text: What color do the veins on your inner wrist appear?

8.text: What is the natural tone of your lips without product?

bodyShape.widestPartQuestion: Which part of your body looks the widest when you look in the mirror?
bodyShape.waistlineDescription: How would you describe your waistline?
bodyShape.hipCurveQuestion: How do your hips look relative to your shoulders?
bodyShape.shoulderLineQuestion: How would you describe your shoulder line?
bodyShape.bustRelativeQuestion: How would you describe your bust size relative to your frame?
bodyShape.weightDistQuestion: Where do you tend to gain weight first or carry most of it?
bodyShape.overallFrameQuestion: How would you describe your overall skeletal frame?
bodyShape.analysisFailed: Body shape analysis failed. Please try again.

result.aiOffline: AI styling advice is currently offline. Your base results are saved! Please check back later for full personalized recommendations.
result.aiSummaryFallback: AI Analysis was unavailable, but your base results are saved. Please try again later for full recommendations.

analysis.heroSub: AI-powered analysis for your perfect look
analysis.question: Question

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

tips.silverJewelry: Silver and platinum jewelry will enhance your cool undertone beautifully.
tips.goldJewelry: Gold and brass jewelry will perfectly complement your warm glow.
tips.berryTones: Rich berry and jewel tones give you a striking, royal appearance.
tips.earthTones: Earthy tones like olive, rust, and mustard harmoniously match your depth.
tips.crispWhite: Crisp white and high-contrast blacks look stunning on you.
tips.creamyBeige: Warm creams and soft beiges are much more flattering than pure white.
tips.charcoalGrey: Charcoal and deep navy are your perfect sophisticated neutrals.
tips.warmTerracotta: Warm terracotta and burnt orange will make your features pop.

winter.contrast: Lean into high contrast combinations for a dramatic, high-fashion look.
winter.jewels: Emerald, sapphire, and ruby are your power colors.
winter.icy: Incorporate icy, frosted pastels as striking accents.

summer.muted: Soft, muted colors are much more flattering than bright or neon ones.
summer.pastels: Cool, powdery pastels like lavender and dusty rose look effortless.
summer.silver: Stick to brushed silver or matte pewter for your accessories.

spring.warm: Clear, warm colors like peach and coral bring out your natural vitality.
spring.clear: Avoid muddy or overly muted colors; keep your palette fresh and bright.
spring.gold: Yellow gold jewelry adds the perfect amount of warmth to your skin.

autumn.earthy: Rich, earthy colors are your best friend—think forest green and ochre.
autumn.rich: Go for deep, saturated warm tones rather than light pastels.
autumn.gold: Antique gold and copper jewelry look phenomenal against your skin.

hourglass.tops: V-neck tops and wrap styles to highlight your waist.

pear.tops: Boat necks and statement sleeves to balance your shoulders with your hips.
pear.bottoms: A-line skirts and wide-leg trousers in darker colors.
pear.dresses: Empire waist and A-line dresses look best on you.

apple.tops: Empire waist tops and tunics with V-necks are very flattering.
apple.bottoms: Straight-leg or bootcut trousers to balance your midsection.
apple.dresses: Shift dresses and empire waist silhouettes look great.

rectangle.tops: Ruffled tops and peplum styles to create the illusion of curves.
rectangle.bottoms: Cargo pants and skirts with added volume.
rectangle.dresses: Cut-out dresses and styles with defined belts.

inverted_triangle.tops: Halter necks and V-necks to visually narrow your shoulders.
inverted_triangle.bottoms: Wide-leg pants and pleated skirts to add volume to your lower body.
inverted_triangle.dresses: A-line and fit-and-flare dresses are perfect for you.
